description: A licensing lifecycle event recorded by Ophan — activation, revocation, expiry, grace period, or compliance alert.

context_schema.event_type: string — activated | revoked | expired | grace_started | warning | suspended | needs-license
context_schema.reason: string? — human-readable reason for the event

ui.label: License Event
ui.description: Licensing lifecycle event — activation, revocation, expiry, or compliance alert.
